title: Parent Counseling * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Foster Families > Parent Counseling * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF OREGON POST ADOPTION RESOURCE CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Supports Oregon adoptive families, state-assisted guardians, and adult adoptees with services like specialized consultations, supportive listening, resource referrals, and free training for families and the professionals who serve them. 6443 SW Beaverton Hillsdale Highway Suite 205 Portland, OR 97221 Eligibility: The organization provides full support to all adoptive and assisted guardianship families in Oregon, adult adoptees, and offers some services to resource families and the professionals who support them Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 241-0799 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON POST ADOPTION RESOURCE CENTER OREGON POST ADOPTION RESOURCE CENTER
